source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the <image>, the Bode magnitude plot of a first-order stable system is constant with frequency. The asymptotic value of the high-frequency phase, for the system, is \(-180^\circ\). This system has ______.
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: one LHP pole and one RHP zero at the same frequency
